products.title: VERSACE Men's Graphic T-Shirt
products.description: VERSACE Men's Graphic T-Shirt. A premium graphic T-shirt crafted from soft breathable cotton with a modern fit. Features high-quality printed artwork, comfortable all-day wear, and durable stitching that makes it ideal for casual outings and everyday styling.

products.title: ZARA Men's Polo Shirt
products.description: ZARA Men's Polo Shirt. A classic polo shirt designed with a refined collar, breathable fabric, and a comfortable tailored fit. Perfect for smart-casual occasions, office wear, or weekend outings.

products.title: GUCCI Men's Slim Fit Shirt
products.description: GUCCI Men's Slim Fit Shirt. A stylish slim-fit shirt tailored for a sharp silhouette. Made from lightweight fabric with a polished finish, offering comfort, versatility, and a sophisticated look.

products.title: PRADA Men's Denim Jacket
products.description: PRADA Men's Denim Jacket. A timeless denim jacket featuring durable construction, comfortable lining, and versatile styling. Ideal for layering through every season while adding a fashionable edge.

products.title: Calvin Klein Women's Summer Dress
products.description: Calvin Klein Women's Summer Dress. A lightweight summer dress designed for comfort and elegance. Features breathable fabric, a flattering fit, and a stylish design suitable for vacations, brunches, and special occasions.

products.title: H&M Women's Floral Dress
